title: Original Netherite Armor Recipes
description: No Smithing Table Required! An easier way to get Netherite Armor. Shapeless.
body:
# Original Netherite Armor Recipes

This is just a simple recipe data pack, nothing special.

20w06a; Added netherite tools, armor, blocks, ingots, etc. 20w10a; Netherite gear are now created through a smithing table.

When armor was first added you only needed your diamond armor piece and 1 netherite ingot in your crafting table to make your netherite armor piece.

- 1 diamond helmet + 1 netherite in any combo = netherite healmet 
- 1 diamond chest + 1 netherite in any combo = netherite chest 
- 1 diamond leggs + 1 netherite in any combo = netherite leggs 
- 1 diamond boots + 1 netherite in any combo = netherite boots 

**Side Note**: The game will most likely tell you that the data pack is out of data depending on the version you are choosing to play but it works just fine 1.13-1.20

![shapeless recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b42a94189fe890cf8e7d65e79797290bbc22e959.png)
